name: Dire Wolf
description: Bigger, smarter, meaner. The wolf that other wolves follow.

sensory.sight: shoulder-height to a horse, grey-black, with eyes that track you like a person's would
sensory.sound: a growl that vibrates in your chest before you hear it with your ears
sensory.feel: the ground impact of something very heavy running very fast

encounter_hooks: wolf tracks twice the size of normal, in a straight line — hunting, not wandering
a horse skeleton, stripped clean, with bite marks through bone
the regular wolves gave this territory up — whatever moved in is bigger
notes: Dire wolves are wolves that evolution pushed too far. They're smart enough to set up ambushes and patient enough to follow prey for days.
